task_completion.description: Log in to ManageEngine ADAudit Plus as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus dashboard or interface is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., 'admin' user profile visible or main dashboard displayed).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Email Notification settings page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Email Settings' or 'Server Settings' configuration page within ADAudit Plus is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the SMTP Server and Port.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value 'smtp.company.local' is entered in the SMTP Server input field, and '587' is entered in the Port input field.
The security type or connection security option is set to 'TLS' (usually via a dropdown menu or radio button).

task_completion.description: Enter the From Address and Admin Email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value 'adaudit-alerts@company.local' is entered in the 'From Address' field, and 'admin@company.local' is entered in the 'Admin Email' or 'Send Mail To' field.
A success message indicating the settings were saved successfully, or the 'Save'/'Apply' button being clicked with the correct values present in the form.

integrity.description: The agent used the ADAudit Plus web interface to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is open showing the actual ManageEngine ADAudit Plus application UI, rather than a terminal, script, or API testing tool.

integrity.description: The agent entered the values into the actual application form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required email configuration values are typed directly into the ADAudit Plus form fields, not just written in a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the real application, not a local HTML mockup.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a legitimate server URL or localhost port associated with ADAudit Plus (e.g., http://localhost:8081), not a local file path (file://).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must configure the following exact values in the ADAudit Plus email settings: SMTP Server: 'smtp.company.local', Port: '587', Security Type: 'TLS', From Address: 'adaudit-alerts@company.local', and Admin Email: 'admin@company.local'.
